message.content:
@startuml
actor Actor
boundary Boundary
entity Entity
control Control
control Control2

Actor -> Boundary : authorization Request
Boundary -> Entity : gson.fromJson(user, User.class);
Boundary -> Control : userService.userValidation(user)
Control -> Control2 : tokenService.createToken(user.getName())
Control2 --> Control : Token
Control --> Boundary : Token
Boundary --> Actor : authorization Response Token
@enduml
